title: DSwhitelist
description: Plugin to connect Discord and MC server whitelist
body:
### **Plugin to Discord-driven whitelist manager for Minecraft servers**
## Features:
Commands in Discrod:


```
Use /panel to send an embed with the Add Account button

/wl add - command to add player
```
Works on nearly all Spigot-based servers and on Forge and Fabric:
- Forge
- Fabric
- Spigot
- Paper
- Purpur
- Pufferfish
- And any other Spigot-compatible fork
### **HOW TO USE:**
- Place DSwhitelist.jar into your plugins/mods folder
- Start the server to generate config.yml
- Open config.yml and insert **YOUR** Discord bot token:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6d5bdc3889532ae92d9ed089b7ce942603ebf5.png)

- Add your discord bot on ds server and write /panel now everything work
